thinking.text:
The user has provided their date of birth (12/19/1992) and phone number (305-555-0729). I need to verify their identity by looking up their information. However, I don't have their user ID, name, or email to look them up directly.

Let me think about what tools I have available:
- get_user_information_by_id - requires user_id
- get_user_information_by_name - requires customer_name
- get_user_information_by_email - requires email

The user hasn't provided their name, user ID, or email. They've only provided date of birth and phone number. I don't have a tool that can look up users by date of birth or phone number directly.

I should ask the user for either their name, user ID, or email so I can look them up and verify their identity against the date of birth and phone number they provided.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you for providing that information! To complete the verification process, I need to look up your account. Could you please also provide either:
- Your full name, or
- Your user ID, or
- Your email address

This will allow me to locate your account and verify that the date of birth and phone number you provided match our records.
